text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I spot Nice Nature at the riverbank.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Sigh. Something's not right after all... I'm still beat after that last race...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm wondering if I should stop and talk to her
after seeing her acting so strangely, when...

text_block_list.name: Dry Goods Store Lady
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Natie! You look a bit tired. Are you pushing
yourself too hard?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
N-no, not at all! I'm fresh as a daisy! I was just
thinking about some stuff.

text_block_list.name: Dry Goods Store Lady
text_block_list.text:
Okay, well, why don't ya have some dried ray
fins? It's not good to be lost in your thoughts for
too long.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
What am I doing? Tiring myself out with racing is
only gonna make people worry.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Mmm, dried ray fin... Sweet and salty... Gotta eat
up and get my energy back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Running back-to-back races recently is taking its
toll on her. I'd better adjust her race schedule...
